Good morning, Anna. Welcome. The team is on the third floor.
Thank you. Where is the meeting room, please?
It is next to the coffee room. We talk about the numbers at ten.
Good. In my opinion, the total is bigger this year.
I agree. And at noon we have a business lunch with a client.
Perfect. I would like to read the menu first.

Good morning, Anna, and welcome to the Sao Paulo office for the day. Here is your plan. First, you meet the team on the third floor and have a coffee. Then we have a meeting at ten. We talk about the numbers and the growth this year. After that, we go to a business lunch with a client. You order from the menu. Finally, in the afternoon, you visit the other department. It is a full day, but you speak English very well now. Have a great day.

Today was a long day at the office, but it was a good day. In the morning I met my new colleagues and the team. I had a coffee and I felt glad. In the meeting I gave my opinion. I said, I think the total is good and the growth is bigger this year. At lunch I ordered the fish dish and a water, please. At the end I asked for the bill. Now I am not nervous. I can work a full day in English. I am proud of my progress.

First, Anna arrives and meets the team on the third floor. Then she has a coffee with a new colleague. Next, in the meeting, she gives her opinion about the numbers. After that, she goes to a business lunch and orders from the menu. Finally, she visits the other department and ends a full day at the office.
